description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a wooden fence, featuring a flat roof and a mix of dark wood and white exterior finishes. The property includes a backyard with a large treehouse built around a mature tree, a trampoline, and a rectangular swimming pool. The front of the bungalow has a driveway with a carport, and the main entrance is accessible via a small staircase. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard is landscaped with shrubs and a patio area, while the interior layout is open-plan with visible living, dining, and bedroom spaces. The overall design emphasizes outdoor living and family-friendly amenities.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced yard featuring a treehouse, pool, and trampoline. The exterior combines dark wood and white finishes, with an open-plan interior and family-oriented outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, large windows, trampoline, pool, and treehouse in the backyard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the treehouse, pool, and the open backyard area with visible patio and trampoline.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, grouped windows, treehouse, and landscaped yard with shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the main entrance steps, carport, and a clear view of the flat roof and window arrangement.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
